messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0048",
  "title": "海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量",
  "page_index": 15,
  "page_range": "15"
}

Section text:
## 海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量

message.content: This section addresses the revenue scale and download volume of the overseas mobile game market. It is structured to answer retrieval questions regarding: (1) **Topics & Metrics**: Total market revenue size, download volume figures, and growth trends for international mobile games; (2) **Entities & Regions**: Specific overseas markets or geographic segments analyzed (not specified in excerpt); (3) **Dates**: Reporting periods or timeframes for the revenue and download data (not provided); (4) **Tables, Figures & Evidence Types**: Likely contains data visualizations or statistical tables supporting market sizing and download trends (content not included in excerpt). No definitions, procedures, or specific claims are present in the provided text. Queries should target high-level international mobile gaming market sizing, download statistics, and regional performance indicators.
